evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: deliver end-to-end projects; BI architecture; data modeling
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Balance between project delivery pressure and architectural quality signals mixed.
evidence.domain_risk: Infrastructure and Real Estate consulting; business decision support
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Consulting on business decisions without regulatory/financial reporting signals moderate risk.
evidence.collaboration_width: analyst and consultant teams; client engagement
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Consulting organization with multiple project teams indicates maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: leading a project team; develop execution plans; design data solutions; conduct client engagements
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Generic skill list without context; recruiter-style boilerplate.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Client-facing consulting model emphasizes commercial/business orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: leading project teams; develop execution plans
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic responsibility for project teams and execution planning.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of testing or quality frameworks.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Consulting delivery framing with no risk register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Consulting engagements often involve greenfield project design.
